theoremObject.statement: For every p4217-unavailable complement residue in the p107/q89 source class, the p43 endpoint right = left - 5014 is inside the 28500 window and satisfies the endpoint compatibility congruence 43^2 | 6323*right + 1.
proof: The endpoint formula for p43 and outsider 6323 is k_43(left) = (74*left + 1323) mod 1849.
On the p107/q89 source class, left residue is 1509 mod 1849 and the source modulus is 0 mod 1849.
Therefore k_43(t) = (74*1509 + 1323) mod 1849 = 200 for every source parameter t, including every t in the p4217 complement.
The endpoint displacement is delta = -14 - 25*200 = -5014, so the p43 endpoint is inside window 28500.
The endpoint construction gives 6323*(left - 5014) + 1 == 0 mod 1849, verified on the source residue with right == 18 mod 25.

ledgerTransition.measureEffect: The unavailable-complement selector obligation is closed at the endpoint-availability layer and replaced by a p43 squarefree-hitting obligation of the same residue count.

notProvedHere: Squarefree hitting for left*(left - 5014)+1 on the p4217 complement family.
A collision-free matching composition for the endpoint choices.
Certification of the p97 or p227 candidates on the p4217/q61 available-child leaf.
Binding the synthetic 282/841 alignment row to a regenerated live family-menu row.
proofBoundary: The p4217 complement now has a universal fallback endpoint selector p43, but the cross-product squarefree layer remains open. The next proof must prove squarefree hitting for left*(left - 5014)+1 over the complement family or emit the first deterministic square-obstruction subfamily.
